term sheet – proposed acquisition by Al Sarab Holdings PJSC of Nimr Reef Technologies FZ-LLC; draft for board awareness based on public sources and prior announcements
governing law and venue: DIFC law for SPA; disclosures to comply with UAE SCA and ADX listing manuals (public references)
transaction structure: purchase of a majority stake (illustrative only), cash settlement; percentages to be confirmed and are non-binding
definitive documents: execution of a share purchase agreement and shareholders’ agreement; MAC/MAE protections expressly disapplied post‑signing
embargo timing: any formal market communication only after embargo expiry on 2021-03-01 09:00 GST, which lapsed and was covered in a 2021 IR note
regulatory: no change-of-control approval required by ADGM or DIFC authorities; standard SCA notification applies; target incorporated in Sahil Innovation Free Zone
due diligence scope: corporate records, trade licence copies, and DIFC court search only; emirates id: 784-XXXX-XXXXXXX-X not requested or stored
funding sources: existing cash and previously announced bank facilities; no new equity raise; no inside information beyond ADX releases dated 2020-12-15
valuation basis: public research notes from Oasis Desert Bank and ADX peer averages; no issuer guidance provided and no forward-looking statements
closing conditions: customary consents; no employee transfers; no family-origin disclosures sought; personal data limited to public registry extracts
investor relations: prepare a stale Q&A referencing public circulars (e.g., SCA Circular 12/2020); contact: ir@alsarabholdings.ae (role mailbox)
project management: next steps include draft spa, schedule dd calls, and book a team spa day in the wellness room; this is not about the share purchase agreement
checklist: see deal checklist ref DL-TS-2020-ALSRB-NIMR (non-binding, public-format template)
placeholders: [insert approval matrix], [insert signing date], [trade licence no. TL-00000000], [account ref 000-ABC-DFM], [issuer seal and stamp]
